lines.speaker: Fidelio
lines.text: H-hello. You l-look like a s-stranger to these p-parts. Would you l-like to buy something? I h-have some s- special offers at the m-minute...some s-sample bottles for s-storing s-snail slime.

lines.speaker: Fidelio
lines.text: (sigh) Th-that's okay. Nobody ever w-wants to buy my wares. Oh, s-sure, if it was food or c-clothes they would though!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are your prices so high?

lines.speaker: Fidelio
lines.text: As you p-probably know, the h-humans hate our kind and k-keep us trapped here. To get my s-stocks I have to sneak into the human lands in s-secret!

lines.speaker: Fidelio
lines.text: All the s-secrecy and d-danger has played h-havoc with my nerves!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But all your stuff is overpriced junk!

lines.speaker: Fidelio
lines.text: N-not at all! They are v-valuable human artefacts smuggled here at g-great personal risk!
